name: biome-preview
_note: world-creator.biome-preview is a PURE, state-independent LENS_ACTIONS handler (it reads only the static BIOMES table, no STATE), so it works even with no globalThis._concordSTATE. It computes a deterministic 6-point day-cycle climate curve + a stormChancePct = min(95, round(hazardScore × 12 × clamp(weatherIntensity,0.5,1.5))). weatherIntensity is clamp()'d to [0.5,1.5] with a default of 1.0, so a poisoned Infinity/NaN/1e308 can never blow up the storm chance — it stays finite and ≤ 95 (pinned by the fail-CLOSED test in server/tests/world-creator-lens.test.js). An unknown biome rejects with 'unknown biome: <id>'. Like all world-creator.* macros this is LENS_ACTIONS (path-3), not in the runMacro MACROS registry the assassin enumerates.
